title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates how Claude Code was used to build a $481,000-generating product in 45 days without prior coding experience. He presents five steps for success: starting with the problem and shipping fast, knowing where to engineer versus delegate, learning vocabulary over syntax, prioritizing smooth execution, and planning for failure modes. The video includes concrete prompts for managing technical debt, auditing for performance issues, and establishing rollback strategies.
